full_description:
I’m handing you a vetted list of healthcare-related leads and need you to turn those cold names into warm, scheduled meetings for our senior team. Your task is simple to state but crucial to our growth: phone each contact, give a concise overview of our business opportunity, handle basic questions, gauge genuine interest, and book a calendar slot with one of our directors.

You’ll receive a brief that covers our offer, common objections, and the direct calendar link we use for booking. Fluency in the local language and English is essential; the ability to switch to Malay when needed will be a bonus that helps you build rapport with certain prospects. A solid phone presence matters more than deep clinical expertise—basic familiarity with healthcare terminology is all that’s required.

I’ll provide a lightweight CRM (or a shared Google Sheet if you prefer) to log every call so we can see, in real time, who was reached, who needs a follow-up, and who has been successfully scheduled. Daily updates are expected; I simply want to open the tracker and know the status of every lead without chasing you for details.

Deliverables I’ll use to sign off the project: 
• A fully updated call log with outcome codes for every lead in the batch. 
• Calendar invitations created for each qualified, interested prospect—with correct contact details and any notes that will help our senior team prep. 
• A short end-of-week summary highlighting objections you’re hearing, patterns you notice, and any tweaks you believe would raise conversion.

If you love talking to new people, can think on your feet, and are comfortable with outbound dialing, I’m ready to send over the script and the first list of numbers today.

full_description:
Commission-Only Sales Closer — Sell to UK Small Businesses (£75/signup + 15% recurring for 12 months, uncapped)

The client is a UK digital services company. Selling websites, SEO, paid ads, social media and AI automation to small UK businesses as modular monthly subscriptions — one bill, no contracts, cancel any time. We've deliberately built something the average plumber, salon owner or café owner can actually afford and understand.

What we need
Closers. Self-employed, commission-only, uncapped. Your job is to sign up small UK businesses that don't yet have a website to our entry-tier Site & Presence product (£250/month, setup free, cancel any time). Easy yes. About £8 a day. Live in 48 hours. We do the rest.

You'll work from a full sales playbook we've already built — master script, sector-specific hooks for trades, salons, cafés, garages, beauty, gardeners and mobile services, an objection bank with the exact words, and three close variants. Training is provided. CRM, audit video template, follow-up email templates — all provided.

What you'll earn
This is structured to build you a recurring income, not just a one-off payday:
 • £75 per signed Site & Presence customer, paid after their first month clears
 • 15% recurring commission on their monthly bill, every month, for 12 months
 • £50 bonus per additional module they add in their first 90 days
 • No clawback after the first 30 days. If they cancel later, you keep what you've earned to that point.
What this means in practice:
 • One signup = £75 upfront + £37.50/month for 12 months = £525 over the year on the entry tier. If they upsell to a bundle, that figure climbs significantly.
 • 5 signups/month = £375 upfront + a recurring tail that builds to roughly £1,100–£1,500/month by month 6, growing toward £2,000+/month by month 12.
 • 10 signups/month = £750 upfront + a tail building toward £3,000–£4,000/month by month 12.
The maths is built so a steady rep doing 5/month is on £25k+/year by year two with no extra effort, just from the tail compounding. A strong rep doing 10/month is comfortably over £40k. The hard work is months 1–3. After that the tail does heavy lifting.

No salary. No base. No cap. If you don't sell, you don't earn — and if you sell hard, no one is going to throttle your pay.
What we provide
 • Complete sales playbook (scripts, sector hooks, objection bank, close variants)
 • Audit video template you customise per prospect (takes 3 minutes per prospect once you've got the hang of it)
 • CRM access, follow-up email templates, signup link
 • Onboarding call + ongoing support from the founder
 • A product that's genuinely good, priced fairly, with no surprise bills — meaning your customers stay happy, stay subscribed, and you keep earning the 15% month after month

Who you are
 • You've done commission-only or self-employed sales before (B2B preferred, SMB ideal)
 • You can pick up a phone and ring a stranger without breaking a sweat
 • You're UK-based or fluent enough in UK English to sound local on the phone
 • You can work your own hours but actually put the hours in
 • You understand that recurring commission means caring about customer fit, not just signatures — we're partners in keeping them subscribed
 • Bonus points: door-to-door, field sales, telesales, agency sales, or recruitment background
Not for you if: you need a base salary, you want warm inbound leads handed to you, you're looking for a quick flip, or you've never sold to a small business owner before.
How to apply

Send a short message — three things only:
 1. One paragraph on the last commission-only or self-employed sales role you did, and what you sold
 2. Your best month's earnings in any sales role, and roughly how many deals that was
 3. A 30-second voice note or short Loom video pitching us anything — your favourite restaurant, a pencil, the last thing you bought. We want to hear how you sound.

No CV needed. No cover letter. If your voice note is good, we'll have a call within 48 hours.

full_description:
The task is to extend an existing AMX NetLinx program on an NX-3200 controller by adding a new feature set that enables seamless, bidirectional communication with a KNX installation. Remote access to the live system, its current source code, and a KNX IP gateway will be provided through a VPN.

Scope 
The existing codebase is stable; no bug-fix work is needed. The focus is strictly on developing and inserting well-structured NetLinx modules (Duet or classic, whichever you feel is best) that expose KNX group addresses so the NX-3200 can trigger and monitor lighting, HVAC, and any other KNX-enabled devices in the building. If a reusable third-party library makes sense, feel free to recommend it; otherwise a clean, from-scratch implementation is acceptable.

Deliverables 
• NetLinx source files and compiled .tkn modules implementing KNX integration 
• A small demo routine showing how to call the new functions from the existing program 
• A concise README covering installation, customisable parameters, and KNX address mapping 
• One live remote test session to verify that commands sent from the AMX touch panel reach KNX devices and that KNX state changes are reflected back on the panel

Acceptance criteria 
1. All KNX group addresses listed in the brief respond within one second to AMX triggers. 
2. Status feedback from KNX updates the AMX UI without manual refresh. 
3. No existing AMX functions or timers are broken, and CPU utilisation on the NX-3200 remains within normal operating range after 24-hour soak test. 

NetLinx Studio, TPDesign5, and a Git repository are already in place; commits must compile cleanly with the current NetLinx firmware. Once the above criteria are met and documentation is complete, the job is considered done.

full_description:
I want you to contact Oklahoma businesses through website contact forms.
Scope of Work For each assigned business type, you will: 
• Find the company website
• Open the Contact Us page or contact form 
• Paste and send the outreach message I provide 
• Take 2 screenshots: 
-------1. completed form before submission 
-------2. confirmation / thank-you page after submission 
• Upload screenshots using the dedicated upload link I provide 
• Fill my name in the link I will provide.

What I Provide ?
• The exact outreach message to send 
• Dedicated upload link for screenshots 
• Your assigned list or batch of businesses Standard Milestone Deliverables Each milestone


requires: 
• 3,500 Oklahoma businesses contacted 
• 7,000 screenshots uploaded (2 screenshots per business) 
• No duplicate businesses 
• Clear screenshots with readable confirmation or completed form 
• Accurate file naming and organization Businesses must have a physical address in Oklahoma, including cities such as Oklahoma City, Tulsa, Norman, Edmond, Broken Arrow, and surrounding areas. 


Payment Schedule:
• Milestone 1 — $4 with 3,500 businesses + 7,000 screenshots.
• Milestone 2 — $10 for 4,000 businesses + 8,000 screenshots.
• Milestone 3 — $20 with 4,000 businesses + 8,000 screenshots.
• Milestone 4 — $40 with 4,000 businesses + 8,000 screenshots
• Milestone 5 is $100 with 10,000 business and 20,000 screenshots
• Milestone 6 is $250 with 25,000 businesses and 50,000 screenshots

Important – Read Carefully Before Applying To qualify for the standard milestone structure above, you must: 
• Read the full job description 
• Follow all instructions exactly 
• Confirm the pay schedule in your reply 
• Confirm the workload required per milestone in your reply 7
• Not negotiate payment terms after applying If you do not read the full job description, negotiate pay, or fail to follow instructions, the payment rate will remain the same, but the required workload per milestone will increase to: 
• 6,000 businesses contacted per milestone 
• 12,000 screenshots uploaded per milestone.

To Apply Reply with: 
1. The payment schedule for milestones 1–4 
2. The number of businesses required per milestone 
3. The number of screenshots required per milestone 
4. Your estimated completion time 
5. Any experience with: 
• website contact form outreach 
• lead generation 
• screenshot capture 
• large-volume data entry 

Applications that do not answer questions 1–3 will be declined or the workload will be increased by 1/3rd without any additional pay .

full_description:
We’re looking for a creative partner who can build a strong, premium visual presence for our brand across Instagram and Facebook — with a clear focus on both high-end content production and performance-driven Meta advertising.

The ideal collaborator should be able to produce polished product photography and engaging short-form reels that feel elevated, modern, and visually consistent with a premium label.

Scope of Work
 1. Content Creation
• Studio-quality product photography
• Short-form reels optimized for Instagram and Facebook
• Smooth transitions, refined editing, subtle motion graphics, and on-brand typography
• Consistent visual identity across all assets
• Content designed with both organic engagement and paid ads in mind
 2. Meta Ads Setup & Launch
• Build and configure Meta ad campaigns for Instagram and Facebook
• Audience targeting strategy and campaign structuring
• Ad copywriting and creative formatting
• Budget pacing and launch optimization
• Setup focused on reach, engagement, and sales conversion
 3. Early Optimization & Monitoring
• Performance monitoring during the initial launch period
• Creative and audience adjustments based on early data
• Recommendations for improving CTR, engagement, and ROAS

When applying, please include:
• Portfolio links showcasing high-end product photography and/or reels
• Examples of Meta ad campaigns you’ve managed
• Any measurable results (ROAS, conversions, engagement growth, CPM improvements, etc.)

full_description:
# Remote Cleaning Operations Manager (Full-Time)

## Pixel Cleaners

Pixel Cleaners is hiring a full-time Remote Cleaning Operations Manager to take ownership of our cleaning delivery operations in Vancouver, BC.

This is not a passive support role. We are looking for someone who can fully own operations, solve problems quickly under pressure, manage cleaners effectively, and ensure every cleaning is delivered properly from start to finish.

The position is fully remote, but the candidate must be available full-time during Vancouver, BC timezone working hours.

## What You’ll Be Responsible For

### Cleaning Operations & Scheduling

* Assign cleaners to jobs based on our existing roster
* Manage daily cleaning operations across Vancouver
* Ensure cleaners arrive on time and complete jobs properly
* Handle last-minute schedule changes and emergencies
* Build contingency plans for call-outs, delays, and operational issues
* Monitor job quality and overall service delivery

### Cleaner Management

* Expand and improve our cleaner roster by recruiting and onboarding new cleaners
* Build strong working relationships with cleaners
* Ensure cleaners have the correct equipment and supplies for each job
* Conduct video inspections and quality control checks with cleaners
* Handle issues such as:

 * cleaners being late
 * no-shows
 * poor service quality
 * cleaners requesting additional billed hours
 * communication issues

### Customer Experience

* Handle customer complaints calmly and professionally
* Resolve service issues quickly
* Ensure clients feel taken care of even when problems happen
* Maintain high service standards and customer satisfaction

## Who We’re Looking For

This role requires someone who thinks ahead constantly.

You should naturally expect things to go wrong and proactively create systems and backup plans to prevent problems before they happen. We need someone detail-oriented, operationally sharp, and highly accountable.

The ideal candidate:

* Stays calm under pressure
* Thinks fast and solves problems quickly
* Takes full ownership of responsibilities
* Has strong operational instincts
* Can manage people firmly but professionally
* Understands how to build effective cleaning crews
* Pays attention to details others miss
* Is proactive instead of reactive

## Requirements

* Full-time availability in Vancouver, BC timezone
* Strong English communication skills (written and verbal)
* Experience in cleaning operations, cleaning companies, hospitality, field operations, or similar industries preferred
* Strong organizational and multitasking abilities
* Comfortable managing multiple moving parts at once
* Ability to work independently without constant supervision

### Bonus (Not Required)

* Spanish language skills
* Previous experience managing remote teams or contractors

## Compensation

* Base salary + percentage of profits/performance incentives
* Significant growth opportunity for the right person
* Long-term role with operational leadership potential

## About Pixel Cleaners

Pixel Cleaners is focused on delivering reliable, high-quality cleaning services across Vancouver and Lower Mainland BC while building strong operational systems and long-term cleaner relationships.

We are looking for someone who genuinely wants to own operations and help scale the company.

I need assistance with filing Form 5472 late for my foreign-owned LLC. There have been no transactions between the foreign owner and the LLC. 

Requirements:
- Must have experience with IRS Form 5472
- Familiarity with foreign-owned LLC tax obligations
- Ability to handle late filing

Ideal Skills:
- Tax preparation and filing
- Knowledge of US tax laws for foreign entities
- Attention to detail and accuracy

In addition, the LLC was filed in NM in Dec 2025

No bank account.
No owner contribution.
No owner loan.
No owner payment of expenses.
No reimbursement.
No business activity.
No assets.
No income.
Formation costs paid by an unrelated friend.
Mail forwarding paid by an unrelated friend.
No transactions between the LLC and its foreign owner.

The LLC was formed via Bizee and 1 year of free registered agent was included in the fee, which was not paid for by the owner. 

The doubt is whether the owner was even required to file Form 5472 for 2025 (ie before April 2026).

And the question is should the LLC make a late submission to the IRS and risk a penalty? If the owner decides to do so (come clean), what are the possible sanctions / penalties?

full_description:
I need a full structural study for a reinforced-concrete floating pontoon that will operate in saltwater. The scope covers both the engineering calculations and all accompanying drawings so I can move straight to fabrication and class approval.

Key objectives 
• Verify buoyancy, global stability and freeboard under live loads. 
• Design the reinforced-concrete hull, internal stiffeners and connection points to withstand wave, current and mooring forces typical of a coastal saltwater site. 
• Check durability for a marine environment (chloride attack, crack control, concrete cover, suitable rebar grades, cathodic protection if required).

Required deliverables 
1. Calculation report (PDF) with clear references to Eurocode/PIANC or equivalent maritime guidelines, including: 
 – hydrostatic and hydrodynamic analyses, 
 – load combinations, fatigue checks and serviceability limits, 
 – reinforcement schedules and bar bending tables. 
2. Drawings package in DWG and PDF: 
 – plan views, 
 – section views, 
 – elevation views, all fully dimensioned with title blocks and revision tables. 
3. Brief construction notes covering concrete mix, curing, joint sealing and suggested mooring hardware locations.

I can supply the preliminary dimensions and a reference pontoon we would like to emulate. Please confirm your preferred analysis software (e.g., SAP2000, STAAD, ANSYS) and turnaround time when you respond.

full_description:
# PROJECT REQUIREMENT DOCUMENT (PRD)

# Indigenous Unified Network Monitoring Platform (Prototype Version)

---

# 1. PROJECT OVERVIEW

## 1.1 Project Title

Indigenous Unified Network Monitoring Platform

## 1.2 Project Type

Defense-grade Network Monitoring Software Prototype

## 1.3 Objective

Develop a centralized monitoring platform capable of aggregating telemetry, logs, metrics, alerts, and device status from multiple heterogeneous systems into a single unified dashboard.

The system must support:

* Multi-source telemetry ingestion
* Real-time monitoring
* Alert generation
* Log aggregation
* Role-based access control
* Redundancy simulation
* AI-based anomaly detection (prototype-level)

This is a prototype-focused implementation intended for demonstration, evaluation, scalability validation, and future defense-grade production development.

---

# 2. PROJECT GOALS

## Primary Goals

1. Build centralized monitoring dashboard
2. Aggregate telemetry from multiple OEM systems
3. Enable single-pane visibility
4. Demonstrate alerting and fault detection
5. Provide modular scalable architecture
6. Simulate high availability and redundancy
7. Build deployable prototype infrastructure

## Secondary Goals

1. AI-assisted anomaly detection
2. Historical analytics
3. Secure authentication
4. Reporting system
5. Deployment packaging

---

# 3. SYSTEM ARCHITECTURE

## 3.1 High-Level Architecture

Frontend Layer:

* React.js
* TypeScript
* Material UI / Ant Design

Backend Layer:

* FastAPI (Python)
* REST APIs
* WebSocket support

Monitoring Stack:

* Prometheus
* Grafana
* Telegraf
* Alertmanager

Logging Stack:

* ELK Stack

 * Elasticsearch
 * Logstash
 * Kibana

Messaging Layer:

* RabbitMQ

Database:

* PostgreSQL

Authentication:

* Keycloak OR JWT-based Auth

Containerization:

* Docker
* Docker Compose

Deployment:

* Ubuntu Server
* Linux environment mandatory

---

# 4. CORE MODULES

# MODULE 1: AUTHENTICATION & USER MANAGEMENT

## Features

* Login/Logout
* JWT Authentication
* Role-based access control
* Session handling

I’m refreshing the retail presence of a new toy line aimed at infants aged 0-3 and need a full packaging concept that bursts with colour and energy while still reassuring parents about safety and quality. The box has a clear window on the front, room for multilingual copy on the back, and must comply with standard choking-hazard labeling for this age group.

full_description:
# Creative Content Partner for Emotional Gift Brand (Instagram + TikTok)

We’re not looking for a typical social media manager.

We’re looking for someone who genuinely loves emotional storytelling, understands internet culture, and gets excited about creating content people *feel*.

Our brand is called **Zoci Voci**.
We create emotional personalized gifts and smart lamps that help people feel close — even across long distances.

Some of our products:

* Long-distance Telepathy Lamps
* Voice-message lamps for couples & families
* Personalized photo lamps
* Emotional gifts for moms, dads, partners, and kids

One of our reels crossed 25M+ views.
Now we want to build a real audience and category around our products.

## What You’ll Do

You’ll help us with:

* Instagram Reels
* TikTok content
* Viral hooks
* Content planning
* UGC direction
* Script ideas
* Trend adaptation
* Editing guidance
* Captions & posting
* Organic growth strategy
* Building a consistent emotional brand voice

This is NOT a boring scheduling job.

We want someone who can:

* Turn products into stories
* Think like a creator
* Understand why people share content
* Create “I need to send this to someone” moments

## The Kind of Person We’re Looking For

You might be perfect if:

* You constantly save reels/TikToks for inspiration
* You naturally think of hooks while watching content
* You understand emotional storytelling
* You know how to make products feel human
* You care about aesthetics and internet culture
* You’ve grown pages before OR deeply understand why content works
* You love experimenting and testing ideas
* You are excited by relationship/family/emotion-driven products

Bonus if you understand:

* Couple/family content
* UGC direction
* Creator outreach
* Meme/trend culture
* Short-form editing
* Viral storytelling
* Consumer psychology

## Important

We are NOT looking for:

* Generic Canva posting
* Corporate social media management
* Someone who just schedules posts
* Agency-style templated content

We want someone who feels like a creative partner.

## How We’ll Work

We can:

* Give products and raw footage
* Ship products to creators
* Collaborate on ideas
* Test multiple hooks weekly
* Move fast and experiment

You can:

* Pitch ideas freely
* Bring your own creative direction
* Help shape the brand voice
* Become a core creative part of the brand

## To Apply

Please send:

1. Your best Instagram/TikTok work
2. Accounts you’ve worked on (if any)
3. 3 reel ideas you’d make for our products
4. Your favorite brand/content creator right now
5. Why you think emotional products go viral

full_description: I need a lightweight Excel + Power BI build that lets me plan every internal audit and then watch the schedule come alive in a clear Gantt view. The single most critical element is the Audit Plan sheet: it has to drive everything else, accept new audits on the fly, and push clean, reliable dates into the visuals without manual rework. Data you will receive from me • Audit Master: audit name, code, type, man-hours/duration and planned month, with a special focus on audits 11-20. • Governance Dates: SMC-GRC, SMC, GBAC and BAC checkpoints for each month Apr – Dec. These milestones act as blockers, so they must surface prominently in the timeline. • Staff Master: the five current auditors (ABZ, DB, WSWZ, AFH, NHS) and room to add more later. Core engine The Audit Plan sheet must capture audit, assigned staff, start/end dates and the three phases—Planning, Fieldwork, Reporting—using friendly dropdowns and auto-calculated durations that link back to the Audit Master settings. Any change here should ripple instantly to every visual. Visual dashboard A two-page Power BI report is enough. Page 1 hosts the Gantt chart with colour-coded bars for each phase, automatic time axis and the governance milestones overlaid. Page 2 can house a compact table or KPI cards so management can filter by auditor, audit type or month and see workload at a glance. Everything should refresh directly from the Excel file without me touching the model. Deliverables 1. Excel file with the three master sheets and the dynamic Audit Plan. 2. Power BI (.pbix) file limited to two report pages, already connected and fully automated. 3. A short hand-off note or video showing how to add new audits, staff or milestones without breaking formulas or visuals. Acceptance criteria • Adding an audit in the Audit Plan instantly extends the Gantt with correct phase lengths. • Governance milestone conflicts appear clearly when an audit overlaps one of the four dates. • No hard-coded ranges; solution works if I insert additional rows or new staff. • Report refresh completes without errors from a single “Refresh” action in Power BI. Please send a detailed project proposal outlining your approach,

I have secured a 1–5 acre vacant parcel in Kentucky for a ground-up church build and now need a Kentucky-licensed civil engineer to guide the site from raw land to fully permitted construction start.

Your primary focus will be twofold: 
• Site planning and development – grading, drainage, stormwater, utility tie-ins, parking layout, ADA access, fire-lane/vehicular circulation, and any environmental or earthwork calculations needed for a house-of-worship occupancy.

full_description:
Looking for a professional 3D artist: Create an interactive web avatar (Rigging + Animations + Lip-sync + [login to view URL])

 Project Overview
We are looking for a professional 3D designer and developer to create a digital avatar for our company (Sarah) to serve as a fully integrated virtual assistant and guide within 360° virtual tours. The avatar will run entirely within a web environment using React Three Fiber (R3F) & [login to view URL], so we are not just looking for an aesthetic GLB file, but a complete production asset ready for the entire pipeline.

 Deliverables
Rigging & Skinning:
Skeleton (66 Bones): Includes 53 for the body (Mixamo Standard) + 13 custom bones for the face, eyes, and tongue.

Realistic Blendshapes (Shape Keys):
15 Oculus visemes for lip support. 52 Apple ARKit blendshapes for full facial animations (must contain real per-vertex delta, not just names).

Animations (7 Animations):
4 basic (idle, listening, talking, thinking) at 30fps and full 1-minute durations.
3 additional animations for virtual tours (greeting, pointing, walking in place).

Built-in Lip-sync system:
TypeScript/JavaScript code to link TTS phonemes to viseme weights, supporting Modern Standard Arabic and 8 Arabic dialects.

[login to view URL] Integration:
R3F components are ready, and the State Machine is configured for blending animations.

3 live examples of operation (Widget, Dashboard, 360° Tour).

Technical Stack and Specifications:
Main Software: Blender 4.5+ (Original source code available, extracted from Maya). Delivery format: glTF 2.0 binary (.glb) with embedded files.

Performance: Lightweight and compatible with phones (GPU Footprint ≤ 80 MB), supports two LOD versions, and 30+ FPS on mid-range phones.

 Strict acceptance criteria (see previous errors)
Files will be programmatically checked using our proprietary Python scripts to ensure:
100x scale issue resolved: The original source file contains a 0.01 per-node scale buried in the hierarchy for some meshes (e.g., teeth and glasses); any rigging without a proper bake and world matrix alignment will be rejected.

Bone and channel matching: No duplicate bones or incomplete facial bone movement channels.

Texture sizes: Maximum 2K for skin, and 1K for everything else to ensure lightweight performance.

 Submission Requirements (How to Submit Your Proposal?)
When submitting your proposal, please include the following (automatic or copied proposals will be immediately disregarded):
Portfolio Link: Previous examples of Humanoid characters you have rigged and blended (preferably web-based).
Tech Stack: Plugins or scripts you rely on in Blender and Three.js.
Timeline: A realistic breakdown of the 4 phases (Rigging → Blendshapes → Animation → Coding and Integration).
Fairing Question (Mandatory): How will you technically address the 0.01 per-node scale issue in the source file coming from Maya to ensure that some meshes don't become oversized during export?
Contract Type: Budget divided into milestones (milestones), with payment released after passing the technical review for each milestone. Code accuracy and smooth performance, along with aesthetics, are the deciding factors.
